questions.explanation: This character was played by Russell Crowe in Gladiator.
The quote refers to a raven, not a crow.

questions.content: A group of them is called a murder.
questions.explanation: Correct — a group of crows is called a murder.

celebrationMessages: Congratulations, ASS. You should be proud.
The murder of crows salutes you, ASS.
ASS has entered the record books. Truly a moment.
Well played, ASS. The crows were watching.
